My first rescue dog(and the best) became my best mate and we would walk for miles in local woods and beyond. Then one morning coming back in the car something wasn't right. Got him to the vet and my gut was right is was terminal after the tests came back. He was looked after brilliantly and didn't suffer before he was put down. He was a big dog who nearly made it to 15. He even had a swim in the river on his last walk. I've always said my dog had went out in a way he would have wanted. Dogs really are the best.

I had to say goodbye to my beautiful dog and I am feeling lost and bereft. She had been very ill for some time - blind, but eating, drinking and happy, writes a reader.

Rollercoaster riders were left stranded 100ft in the air above a near-vertical drop for more than four hours after a ride malfunctioned at a Texas amusement park. Dramatic pictures showed firefighters climbing ladders to rescue eight passengers trapped at the top of the Iron Shark rollercoaster on Galveston's Pleasure Pier on Thursday evening. Although millions of tourists visit Spain every year, it is actually still largely unknown. This country is full of hidden gems: forests ,terraced vineyards ,gorges, deserts ,cliffs, canyons ,plains, waterfalls, lakes, wetlands, volcanos, caves, even Fjords ( in Galicia)After Russia, Spainit offers the greatest variety of landscapes. And do not forget the cultural heritage: fairytale towns, medieval gems ,lots of Roman , arab, prehistoric remains...Most people only know the beaches and big cities but many travelers never get to experience the real Spain

Most people have heard of the Costa del Sol, Costa Blanca and Costa Brava - but Spain has many other costas.

The group had been stuck in the cavern in a remote mountainous area of central Xaysomboun province since May 20, when flash floods stranded them as they searched for gold, early state media reports said. Five of the men were located alive on Wednesday, huddling in a narrow shaft around 984 feet from the cave mouth. In the footage filmed by the divers the men can be seen sat in a huddle on a dry ledge inside the cave with wide grins of relief. They were then handed food and drink by the rescue team before they were led out of the cave down a narrow path.

Surprisingly Expensive for a XJ40, I only paid €3500 for my 1990 Daimler Sovereign 4.0 last month and that's in amazingly good condition

The princess arrived at the Vanity Fair dinner at the Serpentine Gallery in Kensington Gardens on June 29, 1994, in the then brand new green Jaguar XJ40 Sovereign. Jaws dropped as she exited the vehicle wearing an off-the-shoulder black evening gown designed by Christina Stambolian. The statement dress was said to be her public rebuke to Prince Charles after he admitted committing adultery in a TV interview with Jonathan Dimbleby. Princess Diana wore the famous 'revenge dress', knowing in advance that Prince Charles would publicly admit to his affair with Camilla Parker Bowles during a television interview broadcast that same evening.

  • share Princess Diana's Jaguar in which she wore 'revenge dress' goes on sale

  • People are exhausting. When someone is heavier, they get mocked, judged, and picked apart. Then, if they lose weight, suddenly everyone demands a confession, an explanation, or proof that they did it the “right” way. Posh and pecks! David Beckham gets an affectionate kiss from Victoria as body language expert reveals how she uses 'flirt signals to show the world he's still her man' during romantic trip

The romantic Mediterranean coastline worked its magic on David and Victoria Beckham on Thursday as they enjoyed another day of island hopping in Spain. The couple are back in the Balearics, one of their favoured overseas destinations, for a family holiday with daughter Harper, son Romeo and his DJ girlfriend, Kim Turnbull. But amid a packed itinerary the couple still found time for each other after venturing out for a shopping expedition, followed by lunch at a local restaurant, in Ibiza.
  • 695 comments
  • 2 videos
  • share David Beckham gets an affectionate kiss from Victoria

For those who want to really experience the true spirit of Hawaii, DO NOT act like a tourist, act like a GUEST. The magic of the islands lies in the spirit of Aloha. It is something that cannot be explained, but you'll know it when you feel it. The heart of Hawaii lies within its people. They are as much a part of the islands and the islands are a part of them, and their customs and reverence is very important. They are some of the warmest, most welcoming people you will ever meet. They are, however, VERY protective of the place that they call home and have had to fight to keep their culture. The key is RESPECT of the land, the life, and the people. If you want to be waited on hand and foot and your every whim catered to, then stick to the resorts and tourist spots. If you want to really want to experience Hawaii, leave your "Mainland" mentallity behind. Embrace that everything runs on 15 Hawaiian minutes...you get there when you get there. Aloha!

EXCLUSIVERevealed: The anti-Semite who confronted Helen Mirren in the street and called her an 'evil Zionist b****'

Corbynista Tom Carroll (left), from north London , has a history of posting abusive antisemitic material online and was engaged in haranguing Dame Helen and her husband Taylor Hackford (both right) in London, calling her an 'evil Zionist b****'. Oscar-winning actress Dame Helen, 80, has long been outspoken in her support for Israel and opposition to cultural boycotts against the country. The ugly incident featured in an online clip, first posted by an Instagram account called Anti-Fascist Action UK, shows the Oscar-winning actress, 80, being approached as she walked along the street in London with her husband, Taylor Hackford. The video was originally posted in November 2025, in a longer form, and only by the @antifascistactionuk account.

She's gearing up to host the upcoming 13th season of Love Island on Monday.  And Maya Jama gave the contestants a run for their money as she slipped into an array of sexy swimwear for her new collaboration with Agent Provocateur.  The presenter, 31, has signed a mega deal with the lingerie giant, and after fans were left in awe by the campaign snaps, Maya treated her Instagram followers to a slew of behind-the-scenes images from the shoot.

Great photo.

An incredible photo shared to social media shows a comet flying over a mountain in New Zealand.  The comet, known as C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS, had been slowly making its way from the edge of the Solar System past Earth after first being spotted last year.  During April, it graced the skies of the northern hemisphere before Kiwis, Aussies and South Africans had two weeks to spot the shooting star on its orbit around the sun earlier this month.

  • share Incredible photo shows comet in front of the Milky Way over in NZ
